_readme: Edit this file yourself with public injury/squad news you've read (e.g. from press conferences or reputable sports journalism). Add entries like "Argentina": ["Starting striker doubtful with hamstring issue"]. Key = exact team name as used elsewhere in this project (see the Elo ratings table in the dashboard for correct spelling). Not fed into the model -- displayed as a caution flag only, since impact can't be reliably quantified from unstructured news.
